import stripe
import boto3
import cerberus
import pandas as pd

def process_payment(order):
    stripe.api_key = os.environ["STRIPE_KEY"]
    charge = stripe.Charge.create(amount=order["total"], currency="usd")
    return charge

def send_notification(user, message):
    client = boto3.client("sns")
    client.publish(TopicArn="arn:aws:sns:us-east-1:123:events", Message=json.dumps(message))

def validate_input(data):
    schema = {"name": {"type": "string"}, "email": {"type": "string"}}
    v = cerberus.Validator(schema)
    return v.validate(data)

def transform_batch(records):
    df = pd.DataFrame(records)
    return df.to_dict(orient="records")
